calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heidi Li for Ning Zhen.

Ms. Li stated that the Fourth Amended Account had not been filed, that she was trying to figure out a way to zero out the receipts, that services were provided by some Family Members and Tenants with regard to improvements to the property and that there was a value to those services that were not accounted for. In addition, she stated that her organization was a non-profit organization, that they had not charged anything to the Estate for their services, that there was a value and benefit for their services that were not accounted for, and that she had not found a way to balance out the receipts. Ms. Li stated that she would submit a Proof of Service on the Third Amended Account, that there was a typographical error in the petition with regard to the reserve amount and that the amount should be $1,000.00. The Court stated that it will not require filing of the amended account, that it would address the above issues in the order and took the accounting under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Continued To Oct-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Continued To Oct-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Continued To Sep-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heidi Li for and with Ning Xiang Zhen (Petitioner). Fanny Ho (Cantonese Interpreter) also present.

Interpreter sworn in. Ms. Li stated that she filed the Second and Final Amended Account for Distribution and the corrected Inventory and Appraisal (copies were provided to the Court). In addition, Ms. Li stated that the property was to be distributed in equal shares to the Children, that one of the Children just turned 18 years of age and the that Ms. Zhen is the Guardian for the other minor Child. Ms. Li also stated that the summary of accounts on the amended account reflects an arithmetic error. The matter was continued to September 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Li will file the corrected summary of accounts.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney for failure to respond to the Examiner's notes. The return date is December 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Off the record:
The Order to Show Cause is set aside and the matter is off calendar since the petition for final distribution was filed on November 3, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
